```json
    }

```

logs.heading: A0: Monitoring Jira sync progress
logs.content:
```json
{
    "thoughts": [
        "The Jira script has started running in the background (PID 8292).",
        "I need to monitor it by checking the debug log every 30 seconds, up to 10 times.",
        "Let me start monitoring now by checking the current status of the log file.",
        "I'll use a loop approach with wait commands to check periodically."
    ],
    "headline": "Monitoring Jira sync progress",
    "tool_name": "code_execution_tool",
    "tool_args": {
        "runtime": "terminal",
        "session": 2,
        "reset": false,
        "code": "for i in $(seq 1 10); do echo \"=== Check $i at $(date) ===\"; tail -5 /a0/usr/workdir/jira-debug.log; sleep 30; done"
    }
}
```

thoughts: The Jira script has started running in the background (PID 8292).
I need to monitor it by checking the debug log every 30 seconds, up to 10 times.
Let me start monitoring now by checking the current status of the log file.
I'll use a loop approach with wait commands to check periodically.
